title: Restrictions
description:
Restrictions

Restrictions

Condition expressions of the SPEL language are used to specify conditions. However, they have following restrictions.

Variables
	 cannot be used.

Labels
	 cannot be used.

Available
	 functions are limited.

Available Functions

Arm	ArmDef	Asc	Asin

Atan	Atan2
